task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or home screen is visible.
The Puzzle category section is open, displaying various puzzle activities.
The 'Super Brain' activity interface is visible, showing a Mastermind-style logic puzzle board.

task_completion.description: Make guesses to solve the puzzle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Colored pegs or items are placed on the board in rows, indicating deductive reasoning guesses have been made.

task_completion.description: Complete Level 1 and reach the victory screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A victory screen, success animation, or level completion prompt for Level 1 is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GCompris GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual GCompris graphical interface being clicked and used, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The puzzle was solved through genuine gameplay.
integrity.visual_evidence: The board shows a logical progression of guesses (multiple rows of pegs) rather than jumping instantly to a completed state.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No signs of image editing, text editors, or web browsers displaying static images of the victory screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target activity is 'Super Brain' in GCompris, a Mastermind-style logic puzzle game located in the 'Puzzle' category. The VLM should verify the activity opened (worth 25 points).
